species: NUP153 interacts with CTCF and cohesin, and mediates their binding across cis-regulatory elements and TAD boundaries in mouse embryonic stem (ES) cells.
cell_type: NUP153 interacts with CTCF and cohesin, and mediates their binding across cis-regulatory elements and TAD boundaries in mouse embryonic stem (ES) cells.
sample_source: To generate NUP153-deficient ES cells, we transduced cells with two different mouse NUP153-specific shRNA lentivirus.
cell_line: We expressed FLAG-tagged mouse NUP153 (FLAG-mNUP153) in HEK293T cells...
